stemHtml: A pilot who last flew 60 days ago, wants to take passengers on a non commercial flight. Are there any currency requirements they need to consider?

options.a: No, provided the pilot made 3 take offs and landings in the preceding 120 days.
options.b: No, as long as the pilot completes 3 takeoffs, landings and approaches in the preceding 90 days.
options.c: Yes, because the pilot needs to have one take off and landing in the preceding 30 days.
options.d: Yes, because the pilot needs to make an extra flight before taking passengers.
